# Copilot Instructions

Follow the repository's canonical engineering guidance in `AGENTS.md` and
canonical skills under `docs/engineering/skills/`.

For pull requests, read `docs/engineering/skills/github-prs.md` before opening,
replacing, or sharing a PR. Do not duplicate or override that PR guidance here.

For analytics database model or Alembic migration changes, read
`docs/engineering/skills/database-migrations.md`. Do not duplicate or override
that migration guidance here.

For tests, read `docs/engineering/skills/testing.md` before adding, moving, or
reviewing test files. Do not duplicate or override that testing guidance here.
